meta.title: HearMe — AI Speech Recognition for Speech Impairments
meta.desc: HearMe is a revolutionary AI-powered mobile app providing personalized speech recognition for individuals with speech challenges.
meta.ogImageAlt: HearMe mobile app interface - AI speech recognition for individuals with speech impairments

@graph.name: HearMe
@graph.description: HearMe is a revolutionary AI-powered mobile app providing personalized speech recognition for individuals with speech impairments like Cerebral Palsy, stroke, or ALS.

offers.name: Full Plan
offers.description: Monthly subscription following a 1-month free trial.

hero.title:
Your Voice. Your Words.
Finally Understood.
hero.subtitle: HearMe is a revolutionary AI app that learns your unique speech patterns, empowering you to communicate clearly and confidently.

features.title: Empowering Seamless Communication
features.subtitle: Designed for individuals with speech challenges caused by Cerebral Palsy, stroke, or ALS, HearMe combines advanced AI with an intuitive interface.
features.personal_desc: The app adapts to your specific voice patterns using advanced Machine Learning, growing more accurate with every conversation.
features.recognition_desc: Our AI instantly translates your speech into text with ultra-low latency, enabling fluid and natural conversations.
features.output_desc: Speak your phrases aloud using natural voice synthesis, copy text to your clipboard, or share it directly with other apps.
features.fallback_desc: Uncertain recognition? Instantly select your preset phrases directly from the screen to speak, copy, or share seamlessly.
features.translation_desc: Break down language barriers. Instantly translate your thoughts to communicate effortlessly in the world's most common languages.
features.secure_desc: Your voice belongs to you. We protect your data with the same level of encryption used by leading modern banking apps.

howItWorks.title: Your Journey to Clearer Speech
howItWorks.subtitle: Getting started is simple. Our streamlined onboarding ensures the AI adapts to your voice right away.
howItWorks.step1_desc: No downloads or app stores required. Open HearMe directly in your browser to start instantly on any device.
howItWorks.step2_desc: Train 5 core phrases by recording a few voice samples for each. This builds a robust baseline model tailored specifically to your voice.
howItWorks.step3_desc: In the upcoming full version, you can add custom phrases unique to your daily routine, making the AI even smarter.
howItWorks.step4_desc: Let the app speak for you in real time. Through voice synthesis or text display, your words are finally understood.

pricing.title: Simple Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Start for free and upgrade as you grow.
pricing.basic_desc: Perfect for getting started with essential communication tools.
pricing.full_desc: Unlock the full power of custom, personalized AI speech recognition.
pricing.notify_text: Get notified as soon as the Full plan becomes available.
pricing.feat_roadmap: Access to all Roadmap features

roadmap.title: The Future of HearMe
roadmap.subtitle: Our mission goes beyond screens. We are integrating HearMe into your daily life, removing barriers across both digital and physical worlds.
roadmap.item1_desc: Use your personalized voice model to dictate text into any application, directly from your system keyboard.
roadmap.item2_desc: Make crystal-clear calls directly within HearMe. Connect with loved ones effortlessly while our AI ensures you are perfectly understood.
roadmap.item3_desc: A secure, high-performance API enabling third-party services—like banking assistants, customer service bots, and smart devices—to accurately recognize atypical speech.
roadmap.item4_desc: Enhance Siri or Google Assistant with your custom HearMe model. Control your smart home reliably using the assistants you already use.

culture.title: Our Cultural Code
culture.subtitle: We are guided by the HEAR framework: four core values driving our mission to give everyone a voice.
culture.val_h_li1: With users: We are transparent about how our AI works, its capabilities, and its limitations.
culture.val_h_li2: With our team: We foster an open feedback culture where the best idea wins, regardless of job titles.
culture.val_h_li3: With investors: We communicate openly about our challenges and breakthroughs alike.
culture.val_e_li1: For our users: We serve a deeply vulnerable community where every single word matters.
culture.val_e_li2: For our partners: They help us scale our real-world impact and drive meaningful change.
culture.val_e_li3: For our colleagues: The best innovations are born in an atmosphere of mutual respect and support.
culture.val_a_li1: For product quality: We never compromise on recognition accuracy and user experience.
culture.val_a_li2: For continuous learning: The AI field moves rapidly; we strive to always stay one step ahead.
culture.val_a_li3: For innovation: We tackle extreme challenges to push the boundaries of speech technology.
culture.val_r_li1: For privacy: The absolute protection of our users' voice data is our unconditional priority.
culture.val_r_li2: For accessibility: We build a product that must work flawlessly for everyone, everywhere.
culture.val_r_li3: For outcomes: We know that a person's ability to connect and be heard directly depends on our execution.

team.title: Team & Advisors
team.subtitle: HearMe is backed by experts in Machine Learning, medicine, and business, united by a single goal — to give everyone a voice.
team.founder_1_bio: As a Software Architect and product visionary, Maksym leads product strategy and R&D. His core focus is bridging advanced AI with assistive technologies to make communication accessible to all.
team.founder_2_bio: Anastasiia specializes in European innovation programs and strategic partnerships, focusing on securing funding and building international consortiums for scalable, high-impact projects.
team.founder_3_bio: With a background as a general practitioner experienced in clinical medicine and long-term geriatric care, Irina ensures our algorithms address the daily needs of users with speech challenges.
team.founder_4_bio: Specializing in SaaS scaling and business strategy, Mykhailo drives HearMe's sustainable business model for successful international market expansion.
team.advisor_1_bio: Evgenia is a strategic fundraiser expert in driving sustainable growth through European innovation funding, helping transform impactful ideas into international initiatives.
team.advisor_2_bio: As the Head of the Stroke Center at Feofaniya Hospital, Dmytro brings extensive clinical experience in stroke management and neurological rehab, aligning our solutions with real clinical workflows.
team.advisor_3_bio: Kateryna helps HearMe tell its story through clear messaging and strategic communications. She ensures our mission resonates with users, partners, and investors alike.
team.advisor_4_bio: Bringing deep experience in AI architecture, Vitalii advises the team on optimizing complex Machine Learning models to guarantee ultra-low-latency speech recognition.

test_section.title: Help Us Give Voice to Everyone
test_section.desc: Join the testing of our new AI models. Provide feedback on speech recognition accuracy and get lifetime premium access to the HearMe app absolutely free.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have questions or suggestions? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.success_desc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you shortly.
contact.error_generic: Failed to send message. Please check your connection.

waitlist.meta_desc: Join the waitlist for HearMe, a revolutionary AI-powered mobile app for personalized speech recognition.
waitlist.title: Join the Waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: Be the first to experience personalized speech recognition. <br class='hidden md:inline'> Sign up for early access and updates.
waitlist.privacy: We respect your privacy. Zero spam.
waitlist.success_desc: Thank you for joining HearMe. We'll be in touch soon with your early access invitation.

footer.desc: Giving everyone the power to be heard.

maintenance.title: We'll be back soon!
maintenance.desc: We're currently performing scheduled maintenance to improve your experience. We'll be back online shortly.

investors.meta_desc: Invest in the future of speech accessibility. HearMe is raising Pre-seed to accelerate R&D and market expansion.
investors.title: Invest in the Voice of the Future
investors.subtitle: We are raising a Pre-seed round to accelerate R&D and expand our Edge AI speech restoration technology across Ukraine, Europe, and the USA.
investors.video_desc: A brief overview of HearMe's core goals, our mission, and why now is the perfect time to invest.
investors.deck_mission_desc: Over 70M people live in 'silent isolation' due to severe speech impairments from CP, stroke, or ALS. We are restoring their fundamental human right to be understood.
investors.deck_problem_b1: Big Tech (Siri/Alexa) fails to recognize atypical voices
investors.deck_problem_b2: Existing assistive tools require $5k+ hardware, invade privacy, or cause massive lag
investors.deck_solution_desc: An Edge AI mobile app translating atypical speech in real-time.
investors.deck_market_b3: Organic inbound leads with $0 marketing spend
investors.deck_expertise_desc: Built by a former EPAM Engineering Lead with a strong mathematics background and 10+ years of experience, backed by medical, business, and ML experts.
investors.dataroom_desc: Access our full suite of documents, including the Pitch Deck, financial models, and technical roadmap. Available upon request.

testing.meta_desc: Join the open alpha testing of HearMe. Help us improve our AI speech recognition and get lifetime premium access.
testing.hero_title: Join the HearMe Open Alpha Testing
testing.hero_subtitle: We are building technology that helps people with CP, stroke consequences, and other speech challenges communicate more freely. Join the testing of our first web version (PWA) and help us improve our individual speech recognition algorithms.
testing.benefits_title: What you get as a tester
testing.benefit_1_desc: All active participants who share feedback will receive free premium access to future native apps forever after the official release.
testing.benefit_2_desc: You can configure your first everyday phrases or custom phrases tailored to the specifics of your voice today.
testing.benefit_3_desc: We collect minimal data (only Google account or Email). Your voice samples are used exclusively to train your personal model and can be deleted at any time upon request.
testing.step_1_desc: Click the button below and take a short survey in Google Forms (it takes up to 3 minutes).
testing.step_2_desc: We will send instructions on how to install the PWA app to your email once your application is processed.
testing.step_3_desc: Record phrases, check the recognition accuracy, enjoy all the benefits, and help us get better.

error404.title: Oops! Page Not Found
error404.desc: We can't seem to find the page you're looking for. It might have been moved, deleted, or the URL contains a typo.
